_comment: Merge these deny rules into your project's .claude/settings.json (or ~/.claude/settings.json) to stop Claude Code from reading secrets: .env files AND the retell-sip-*.local.json files this skill writes generated SIP credentials to. Read(...) denies cover the file tools; the Bash(...) denies cover shell workarounds like `cat`. Deny rules always win over allow rules and across scopes.
